notes: Built from publicly accessible forum/article references to FordTechMakuloco videos after direct YouTube search results were inconsistent in this environment. Use as a starter source file and backfill direct video URLs later where missing.

records.title: Ford 4.6L & 5.4L 3V Spark Plug Removal
records.problemAddressed: Safe spark plug removal on two-piece 4.6L/5.4L 3V Ford engines.
procedureSummary: Work each plug loose carefully instead of forcing it out.
Be prepared for broken-plug extraction if one separates.
warnings: Broken two-piece plugs add labor fast if the safe removal process is skipped.

records.title: Ford 5.4L 3v Triton Engine Tick Tap Diagnosis and Fix!
records.problemAddressed: Separating upper-engine tick/tap concerns from other front-engine noises on the 5.4 3V.
procedureSummary: Listen for the noise source before replacing parts.
Separate spark-plug, timing, and exhaust-related ticking causes.
warnings: Do not assume every tick is cam phasers or a belt-driven problem.

records.title: Ford F-150 5.4L 3v: Passenger Exhaust Manifold Replacement
records.problemAddressed: Passenger-side exhaust manifold leak and broken-stud repair context on the 5.4 3V.
procedureSummary: Remove the manifold with attention to broken studs and hardware access.
Use replacement studs, gaskets, and extractors as needed.
warnings: Stud extraction difficulty drives labor cost and risk on this job.

records.title: FordTechMakuloco 5.4 3V timing chain replacement series
records.problemAddressed: Multi-part timing-chain and cam-phaser teardown/rebuild guidance for the 5.4 3V.
procedureSummary: Front-engine teardown is split across a four-part video series.
The series is used by owners as pre-job orientation before a full timing repair.
warnings: This is not a casual DIY job; timing alignment and front-cover removal are major steps.
